sections.title: SCOPE
sections.text: This standard (formerly CAC/RS 52 -1971) shall apply to quick frozen strawberries (excluding quick frozen strawberry puree) of the species Fragaria grandiflora L. and Fragaria vesca L. as defined below and offered for direct consumption without further processing, except for size grading or repacking if required. It does not apply to the product when indicated as intended for further processing or for other industrial purposes.

sections.title: Product definition
sections.text: Quick frozen strawberries are the product prepared from fresh, clean, sound, ripe and stemmed strawberries of firm texture conforming to the characteristics of Fragaria grandiflora L. or Fragaria vesca L.

sections.title: Process definition
sections.text: Quick frozen strawberries are the product subjected to a freezing process in appropriate equipment and complying with the conditions laid down hereafter. This freezing operation shall be carried out in such a way that the range of temperature of maximum crystallization is passed quickly. The quick-freezing process shall not be regarded as complete unless and until the product temperature has reached -18 �B0C (0 �B0F) at the thermal centre after thermal stabilization. The recognized practice of repacking quick frozen products under controlled conditions is permitted.

sections.title: Handling practice
sections.text: The product shall be handled under such conditions as will maintain the quality during transportation, storage and distribution up to and including the time of final sale. It is recommended that during storage, transportation, distribution and retail, the product be handled in accordance with the provisions in the Code of Practice for the Processing and Handling of Quick Frozen Foods (CXC 8-1976).1

sections.title: Style
sections.text: (a) Quick frozen strawberries shall be presented as whole, halved, sliced or cut. (b) Quick frozen strawberries may be presented as free-flowing (i.e. as individual berries not adhering to one another) or non free-flowing (i.e. as a solid block). (c) Other styles Any other presentation of the product shall be permitted provided that it: i) is sufficiently distinctive from other forms of presentation laid down in this standard; ii) meets all other requirements of this standard; and iii) is adequately described on the label to avoid confusing or misleading the consumer.

sections.title: Sizing
sections.text: (a) Whole strawberries may be presented as sized or unsized. (b) If whole strawberries are size graded, they shall be reasonably uniform within each package such that the diameter of the largest berry does not exceed the diameter of the smallest berry by more than 10 mm, measured according to the maximum diameter. (c) In the case of Fragaria grandiflora L., the maximum diameter of each berry whether sized or unsized shall not be less than 15 mm.

sections.title: Organoleptic and other characteristics
sections.text: Quick frozen strawberries shall be: (a) of good colour; (b) free from foreign flavour and odour; (c) intact, if whole, and not materially disintegrated; (d) intact, if halved, sliced or cut and not seriously affected by disintegrated fruit; (e) clean, practically free from sand and grit and free from other foreign material; (f) practically free from stalks, parts of stalks, calyces, leaves and other extraneous vegetable material; (g) sound, practically free from mould, insect bites and other blemishes; (h) normally developed; (i) of similar varietal characteristics in each package; and (j) when presented as free-flowing, practically free from berries adhering to one another (whole, halved, sliced or cut), which cannot be easily separated by hand without damage when in a frozen state; not icy.

sections.text: 5.1 It is recommended that the product covered by the provisions of this standard be prepared and handled in accordance with the appropriate sections of the General Principles of Food Hygiene (CXC 1-1969),2 and other codes of practice recommended by the Codex Alimentarius Commission which are relevant to this product. 5.2 To the extent possible in good manufacturing practice, the product shall be free from objectionable matter. 5.3 When tested by appropriate methods of sampling and examination, the product:  - shall be free from microorganisms in amounts which may represent a hazard to health;  - shall be free from parasites which may represent a hazard to health; and  - shall not contain any substance originating from microorganisms in amounts which may represent a hazard to health.

sections.title: 3.5.2 Drained fruit ingredient
sections.text: (a) The drained fruit ingredient is determined by thawing the product until it is practically free from ice crystals and then draining on a screen "3 mesh/cm" (8 mesh/inch) for two minutes. The weight of fruit retained on the screen is "drained fruit ingredient". Any of the material described in paragraph 3.5.1(a), (b) or (c) found in the drained syrup shall be added to the drained fruit ingredient for the purpose of applying the tolerances. (b) When dry sugar has been added to whole berries after freezing, the dry sugar shall be washed off with water before draining.

sections.title: The name of the food
sections.text: The name of the food as declared on the label shall include "strawberries" or in the case of Fragaria vesca L., "wild strawberries" or "alpine strawberries". The words "quick frozen" shall also appear on the label, except that the term "frozen"i may be applied in countries where this term is customarily used for describing the product processed in accordance with subsection 2.2 of the standard.

sections.title: Size designation
sections.text: If a term designating the size of the strawberries is used: (a) it shall be supported by a correct graphic representation on the label of the size range to which the strawberries predominantly conform; and/or (b) by a statement of the predominant range of the maximum diameter of the strawberries in millimetres, or fractions of an inch in those countries where the English system is in general use: and/or (c) it shall conform to the customary method of declaring size in the country in which the product is sold.

sentences.original: Quick frozen strawberries shall be: (a) of good colour; (b) free from foreign flavour and odour; (c) intact, if whole, and not materially disintegrated; (d) intact, if halved, sliced or cut and not seriously affected by disintegrated fruit; (e) clean, practically free from sand and grit and free from other foreign material; (f) practically free from stalks, parts of stalks, calyces, leaves and other extraneous vegetable material; (g) sound, practically free from mould, insect bites and other blemishes; (h) normally developed; (i) of similar varietal characteristics in each package; and (j) when presented as free-flowing, practically free from berries adhering to one another (whole, halved, sliced or cut), which cannot be easily separated by hand without damage when in a frozen state; not icy.

classification.sentence: Quick frozen strawberries shall be: (a) of good colour; (b) free from foreign flavour and odour; (c) intact, if whole, and not materially disintegrated; (d) intact, if halved, sliced or cut and not seriously affected by disintegrated fruit; (e) clean, practically free from sand and grit and free from other foreign material; (f) practically free from stalks, parts of stalks, calyces, leaves and other extraneous vegetable material; (g) sound, practically free from mould, insect bites and other blemishes; (h) normally developed; (i) of similar varietal characteristics in each package; and (j) when presented as free-flowing, practically free from berries adhering to one another (whole, halved, sliced or cut), which cannot be easily separated by hand without damage when in a frozen state; not icy.

pages.title: STANDARD FOR QUICK FROZEN STRAWBERRIES
pages.summary: Página inicial do documento com título principal e cabeçalho. Conteúdo restrito à informação de adoção e emendas. Apenas um nó nível 1 estruturado para RAG.

A página contém um título nível 1 não numerado '2022 Amendment' em caixa alta, com texto explicativo associado. O cabeçalho presente é 'CXS 52-1981  2'. A estrutura é simples com um único nó para a emenda de 2022, sem continuidade para outras páginas.

A página apresenta uma estrutura típica de normas técnicas com títulos numerados hierarquicamente. Há três grandes seções de nível 1: SCOPE, DESCRIPTION e ESSENTIAL COMPOSITION AND QUALITY FACTORS. A seção DESCRIPTION é subdividida em várias subseções até o nível 3, incluindo definições, práticas e apresentação do produto. A seção ESSENTIAL COMPOSITION AND QUALITY FACTORS inicia com duas subseções, incluindo composição detalhada até subsubseções. O texto é associado adequadamente aos seus títulos, e indica continuidade para a próxima página nas seções mais extensas. O cabeçalho é identificado como CXS 52-1981  3, e não há título de documento visível na página.

A página apresenta uma sequência de seções principais de nível 1 numeradas hierarquicamente (3.3, 3.4, 3.5) com subseções numeradas (3.3.1, 3.3.2, 3.4.1 a 3.4.6, 3.5.1). As seções 3.3 e a subseção 3.3.1 indicam continuidade desde a página anterior, indicando que o conteúdo destas começou antes. A seção 3.5 e sua subseção 3.5.1 indicam que o conteúdo continua para a próxima página. O texto está associado corretamente e os títulos aparecem explicitamente na página. Não há título do documento visível e o cabeçalho é identificado corretamente.

A página contém seções principais de nível 1 numeradas de 3.5 a 6 com subseções. As subseções detalham procedimentos e critérios específicos. Não há indicação de continuidade de conteúdo desta página para a próxima ou vice-versa. O cabeçalho da página é identificado. A hierarquia é clara, adequada para uso em RAG.

Não há continuidade de conteúdo para a página anterior ou posterior, e o texto foi associado corretamente a cada nó estrutural para uso em RAG.
